SCENARIO

WHERE : France, the Obsidian Masquerade Ball

STORY : The Obsidian Masquerade Ball was the place to be for wealthy families. It offered a little sense of anonymity where no where else in France offered the same. It was the best place for her to find a new victim to use spouse to marry in the future. That was until she noticed the one person who ruined her families name until she brought it back from the brink of bankruptcy. She had her eyes set on a new target.
